blended.narrative: Le Relais is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 2.9 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 2 ft. Looking ahead, 15 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Monday: 2.8" of snow, highs of 41°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 2.3" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 3.5" of snow, highs of 23°F. Expect powder.
